creator: jarrod@downtools.com.au
text:
Attached is an updated patch [1] containing a modified version of the 
update provided by Bryan as well as some locale tweaks requested by Cejka. 
I have recreated the pre-utmpx patch as its source appears to have been 
taken from the file system after the post-patch target had run (extra 
patches are applied during the do-patch target).

Thanks to both Bryan and Cejka.

[1] http://www.downtools.com.au/~jarrod/FreeBSD/net-mgmt-nagios-plugins-1.4.16.diff

Jarrod.
